markets.question: Stade Rennais FC 1901 vs. FC Metz: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game between Stade Rennais FC 1901 and FC Metz, scheduled for March 22 at 12:15 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Stade Rennais FC 1901 and FC Metz combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: 1. FSV Mainz 05 vs. Eintracht Frankfurt: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Bundesliga game between 1. FSV Mainz 05 and Eintracht Frankfurt, scheduled for March 22 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both 1. FSV Mainz 05 and Eintracht Frankfurt each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

markets.question: Solana Up or Down - March 12, 1AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.
